scripts.check:shared-dependencies: cd solidity && bun run check:shared-dependency && cd ../ui && bun run check:shared-dependency
scripts.refresh:shared-dependencies: cd solidity && bun run refresh:shared-dependency && cd ../ui && bun run refresh:shared-dependency
scripts.install:anvil: bash -lc 'if ! command -v anvil >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -L https://foundry.paradigm.xyz | bash && export PATH="$HOME/.foundry/bin:$PATH" && foundryup; fi'
scripts.generate:ui: bun run generate:shared-js && bun run generate:ui-vendor
scripts.check:generated-clean: bun run generate && git diff --exit-code -- shared/js solidity/artifacts solidity/ts/types/contractArtifact.ts solidity/types/contractArtifact.ts ui/js ui/ts/abis.ts ui/ts/contractArtifact.ts ui/ts/deploymentArtifacts.ts ui/ts/deploymentsArtifacts.ts ui/vendor
scripts.setup: bun install --frozen-lockfile && cd ui && bun install --frozen-lockfile && cd .. && bun run setup-contracts && bun run shared:build && bun run ui:vendor && cd ui && bun run build && bun run build:tests
scripts.generate: bun run generate:contracts && bun run generate:ui
scripts.tsc:solidity: cd solidity && bun run check:shared-dependency && bun x tsc --noEmit
scripts.tsc: bun run ensure-shared-build && bun run check:shared-dependencies && bun run tsc:app && bun run tsc:scripts && bun run tsc:solidity
scripts.ui:setup: bun install --frozen-lockfile && cd ui && bun install --frozen-lockfile && cd ../solidity && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run setup && cd .. && bun run generate && cd ui && bun run build && bun run build:tests
scripts.app:build: bun run generate && cd ui && bun run build && bun run build:tests
scripts.ui:build:prod: bun run generate && cd ui && bun run build:prod
scripts.test: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun run check:shared-dependencies && bun run tsc && bun test --parallel=4 --timeout 300000
scripts.coverage:ui: bun run ensure-shared-build && bun run check:shared-dependencies && bun test --isolate --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-reporter=text --coverage-dir=coverage/ui ui/ts/tests
scripts.coverage:contracts:ts: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-reporter=text --coverage-dir=coverage/contracts-ts solidity/ts/tests
scripts.coverage:contracts:bytecode: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && SOLIDITY_BYTECODE_COVERAGE=1 bun test solidity/ts/tests
scripts.coverage: bun run coverage:ui && bun run coverage:contracts:ts && bun run coverage:contracts:bytecode
scripts.check: bunx @biomejs/biome check package.json .prettierrc.json shared/package.json ui/package.json solidity/package.json tsconfig.scripts.json README.md AGENTS.md docs scripts shared/ts solidity/ts ui/AGENTS.md ui/ts ui/build ui/dev-server.ts ui/css && bun scripts/lint-no-bare-catch.mts && bun run check:solidity-format
scripts.check:changed: bunx @biomejs/biome check --changed --since origin/main package.json .prettierrc.json shared/package.json ui/package.json solidity/package.json tsconfig.scripts.json README.md AGENTS.md docs scripts shared/ts solidity/ts ui/AGENTS.md ui/ts ui/build ui/dev-server.ts ui/css
scripts.lint: bun x @biomejs/biome check package.json .prettierrc.json shared/package.json tsconfig.scripts.json scripts shared/ts solidity/ts ui/ts ui/build ui/dev-server.ts && bun scripts/lint-no-bare-catch.mts
scripts.lint:fix: bun x @biomejs/biome check --write package.json .prettierrc.json shared/package.json tsconfig.scripts.json scripts shared/ts solidity/ts ui/ts ui/build ui/dev-server.ts
scripts.format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write package.json .prettierrc.json shared/package.json ui/package.json solidity/package.json tsconfig.scripts.json README.md AGENTS.md docs scripts shared/ts ui/AGENTS.md ui/tsconfig.json ui/build ui/dev-server.ts solidity/ts ui/ts ui/css && bun run format:solidity
scripts.ui:docker: docker build -f ui/Dockerfile . -t zoltar-ui && docker run --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway zoltar-ui
